name: Squats
description: Fundamental lower body compound movement. Builds quad, glute, and hamstring strength through a deep knee bend.
tips: Keep weight in your heels, not your toes
Push knees out over your toes, don't let them cave in
Go as deep as your mobility allows

variants.name: Jump Squats
variants.description: Explosive squat with a jump at the top. Builds power and burns calories fast.

variants.name: Sumo Squats
variants.description: Wide stance with toes pointed out. Emphasizes inner thighs and glutes.

variants.name: Wall Sit
variants.description: Isometric hold with back against a wall at 90 degrees. Pure quad endurance.
